<!--
Thanks for contributing! Fill in the sections below.
One change per PR. Multiple unrelated changes will be split or closed.
-->

## What this PR does

<!-- One sentence. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] New resource (links to an official source)
- [ ] Resource update (moved / renamed / version bumped)
- [ ] New playbook (merchant or agent)
- [ ] New comparison row
- [ ] New runnable example
- [ ] Fix (broken link, typo, factual error)
- [ ] Docs / glossary / FAQ
- [ ] Other (explain below)

## Source

<!--
Link to the official spec, doc, blog post, repo, or public artifact that backs this change.
For playbooks: link to a public reference (doc, repo, talk, post-mortem).
-->

-

## Checklist

- [ ] Single change per PR
- [ ] Linked to an official source (or public artifact for playbooks)
- [ ] Alphabetized within its section, unless an ordering rationale is stated
- [ ] No marketing language ("leading", "best-in-class", "production-grade" cut)
- [ ] Index file updated if this adds a new entry
- [ ] Local link checker run (or accept CI verdict)
- [ ] If code: runs locally with documented prerequisites, license header present, no secrets

## Notes for the reviewer

<!-- Anything that helps review go faster: tradeoffs, edge cases, why this wording over another. -->
